servinfo.title: Acceleration or deceleration is not available by operating RES/ACC or SET/COAST switch

item.ptxt: Perform cruise control system check referring to Cruise Control System Check before this Cruise Control System Symptom Diagnosis.
Check each part in the order from the top of the following list.

condition.ptxt: Acceleration or deceleration is not available by operating RES/ACC or SET/COAST switch

action.ptxt: Check RES/ACC or SET/COAST switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.
